fields.helpText: This number is created automatically by VA FileMan.  It should not be altered in any way.  Adding, editing, or removing entries from this file could have severe and negative impacts on the operation of the RUG-II software and could cause losses in reimbursement for long term care.

This field contain the name of the RUG-II group (1-17).  These groups are maintained by the MAS module with direction from MAS VACO and the Austin DPC.  Altering of these entries (or adding or removing entries) will have a severe and negative impact on operations of the RUG-II software at your medical center.  Impacts may include losses of reimbursement.
This multiple contains data on the number of weighted work units appied to this RUG-II group each fiscal year.  This data is supplied by the Boston DPC.
